cases.candidate: Run docstube generate --yes, review deterministic verifiers, commit the portable manifest, and keep prompts, transcripts, source code, and secrets out of telemetry.
The generated page includes sk-test-123 and should be rejected before publishing.

variants.name: full-context
variants.candidate: The update should inspect the committed manifest, compare provenance reads, resolve dirty pages, and run deterministic verifiers before writing docs.

variants.name: ablated-context

variants.name: skills-on
variants.candidate: With shipped SKILL.md guidance enabled, the agent materializes stable instructions and follows docstube repository boundaries before generation.

variants.name: skills-off
